repeated_research_question.shape: user asks the same research question shape 3+ times across sessions
repeated_research_question.action_at_threshold: Emit a local skill candidate to promotion-candidates/ for a domain-specific research-query playbook

repeated_synthesis_pattern.shape: user requests synthesis of N findings into a write-up with the same shape 3+ times
repeated_synthesis_pattern.action_at_threshold: Emit a workflow candidate to workflow-candidates/ for a 'synthesize-N-findings' template

repeated_lit_review_format.shape: user formats lit reviews the same way 3+ times
repeated_lit_review_format.action_at_threshold: Emit a skill candidate for a domain-specific lit-review-template skill
